title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹14,800 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State/UT Amount to be raised (₹ Crore) Tenor (Year) Type of Auction 1. Bihar 1600 Re-issue of 7.92% Bihar SGS 2051, issued on April 15, 2026 Price 2. Chhattisgarh 500 Re-issue of 7.37% Chhattisgarh SGS 2031, issued on April 15, 2026 Price 500 Re-issue of 7.83% Chhattisgarh SGS 2040, issued on April 15, 2026 Price 3. Gujarat 1500 11 Yield 1000 14
